title: AsphaltCraft
description: mod that adds roads to minecraft
body:
simple mod that adds simple black concrete roads
> *The English translation is not finished*
> 
![bike lane, road with zebra crossing, stop line...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd19272ce1300fdbc3a869907fe7ab1e88ad1fd0.png)
-White and yellow lines
# coming soon:
- transversal lines
- connected textures
  (waiting for Connectedness update)
- much more!
### this mod was made with mcreator!
